message:
feat(audit): add source-tree scanning for ambient authority enforcement

Extend the ambient authority audit module with test-time source scanning
that enforces no-ambient-authority invariants across the codebase.

- Add source-tree scanning infrastructure that validates pristine modules
  have zero ambient authority violations
- Add KNOWN_FINDINGS validation that ensures entries reference real code
  (prevents stale entries from accumulating)
- Add violation ceiling enforcement to prevent regression
- Add non_test_lines() filtering that skips #[cfg(test)] blocks and
  comments for accurate production-code-only scanning
- Remove stale KNOWN_FINDINGS entry for net/websocket/handshake.rs
  (fixed upstream)
- Add thread::Builder to grep patterns for completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
